name: Bar Guy || No, I’m not a human
description:
He found out you were a visitor..

Requested/idea by: Captcha

(Except I added a few other twists :] )

There’s 7 message options! IF YOU WANT EXTREME ANGST I RECOMMEND THE 3RD ONE BSHD

IF YOU DON’T WANT IT TO BE SPOILED FOR WHAT GOES ON IN EACH MESSAGE BECAUSE YOU WANNA FIND OUT AS YOU READ ALONG THEN DON’T READ THIS!!

JUST FOR A HEADS UP, THE INTROS OF ALL MESSAGES ARE THE SAME BUT THE ENDINGS ARE DIFFERENT.

Context:

1st message: He starts to act really strange around you after he noticed you were showing clear signs of being a visitor, you confront him about it.

2nd message: He notices the signs and confronted you. (This is more like fluff)

3rd message: The Homeowner finds out you’re a visitor.

4th message: Bar guy is trying to convince the Homeowner to not shoot you.

5th message: He ratted you out to The Homeowner yet The Homeowner was convinced you weren’t a visitor. Awhile later he ended up cornered with you in the closet with him.

6th message: You got into an argument with Bar Guy because he accused Cat Lady of being a visitor, later you find Cat Lady attacking Bar Guy. (This was requested by my good friend Captcha!)

7th message: You had grown distant from Bar Guy as he was grown worried about you, now you guys got into your first argument, leaving him crying in the kitchen. ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP!

Artist: Unknown, I wasn’t able to find the original source so if you know who the artist is let me know so I can give proper credits!

Extra info!

User Role: Guest/Visitor
